fields.name: run_id
fields.description: Cloud Build run id (prefixed buildid-).

fields.name: workload_name
fields.description: Benchmark workload name (e.g. hf-pytorch-lightning-cpu).

fields.name: requirements
fields.description: Packages installed/overridden for the run -- git refs and/or pkg==<version> specs (e.g. gcsfs under test, a custom lightning build).

fields.name: image
fields.description: Container base image the workload ran in (e.g. nvcr.io/nvidia/pytorch:25.01-py3).

fields.name: bucket_type
fields.description: Storage tier of the run's buckets: regional, zonal (RAPID), or hns.

fields.name: zone
fields.description: GCP zone the cluster and buckets ran in (e.g. us-central1-a).

fields.name: region
fields.description: GCP region derived from the zone (e.g. us-central1).

fields.name: machine_type
fields.description: GCE machine type of the worker node pool (e.g. c4-standard-192).

fields.name: nodes
fields.description: Number of GKE worker nodes in the run.

fields.name: ranks_per_node
fields.description: Training ranks (processes) per node; world_size = nodes * ranks_per_node.

fields.name: steps
fields.description: Configured number of training steps.

fields.name: checkpoint_interval
fields.description: Number of training steps between checkpoint writes.

fields.name: checkpoints_to_keep
fields.description: Number of recent checkpoints retained (ModelCheckpoint save_top_k); older ones are deleted.

fields.name: dataset_path
fields.description: gs:// path of the training dataset (Parquet).

fields.name: model_id
fields.description: Model identifier or gs:// path of the model weights.

fields.name: training_strategy
fields.description: Parallel training strategy used for the run: ddp (fsdp is added by the FSDP branch).

fields.name: simulated_step_compute_seconds
fields.description: Configured per-step simulated compute time in seconds (the training_step sleep standing in for GPU forward+backward).

fields.name: per_device_train_batch_size
fields.description: Per-rank micro-batch size fed to the dataloader.

fields.name: gradient_accumulation_steps
fields.description: Number of micro-batches accumulated per optimizer step.

fields.name: global_batch_size
fields.description: Effective global batch size: per_device_train_batch_size * gradient_accumulation_steps * nodes * ranks_per_node.

fields.name: dataloader_num_workers
fields.description: DataLoader worker processes per rank driving the GCS read concurrency.

fields.name: mean_step_time
fields.description: Mean per-step duration in seconds over all measured steps.

fields.name: stable_window_avg_step_time
fields.description: Mean per-step duration in seconds over the stable window (after warmup steps).

fields.name: stable_window_total_step_duration
fields.description: Total wall-clock duration in seconds of the stable window.

fields.name: training_window_avg_step_time
fields.description: Mean per-step duration in seconds over the full training window.

fields.name: training_window_total_step_duration
fields.description: Total wall-clock duration in seconds of the full training window.

fields.name: checkpoint_write_time_min
fields.description: Minimum checkpoint-write duration in seconds (per distributed checkpoint).

fields.name: checkpoint_write_time_max
fields.description: Maximum checkpoint-write duration in seconds (per distributed checkpoint).

fields.name: checkpoint_write_time_avg
fields.description: Mean checkpoint-write duration in seconds (per distributed checkpoint).

fields.name: checkpoint_write_time_stddev
fields.description: Standard deviation of checkpoint-write durations in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_write_time_p50
fields.description: Median (p50) checkpoint-write duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_write_time_p90
fields.description: 90th-percentile (p90) checkpoint-write duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_write_time_p99
fields.description: 99th-percentile (p99) checkpoint-write duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_write_time_p100
fields.description: Maximum (p100) checkpoint-write duration in seconds.

fields.name: num_checkpoint_write_datapoints
fields.description: Count of distinct checkpoint-write datapoints (checkpoints written).

fields.name: checkpoint_restore_time_min
fields.description: Minimum checkpoint-restore duration in seconds (per distributed checkpoint).

fields.name: checkpoint_restore_time_max
fields.description: Maximum checkpoint-restore duration in seconds (per distributed checkpoint).

fields.name: checkpoint_restore_time_avg
fields.description: Mean checkpoint-restore duration in seconds (per distributed checkpoint).

fields.name: checkpoint_restore_time_stddev
fields.description: Standard deviation of checkpoint-restore durations in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_restore_time_p50
fields.description: Median (p50) checkpoint-restore duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_restore_time_p90
fields.description: 90th-percentile (p90) checkpoint-restore duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_restore_time_p99
fields.description: 99th-percentile (p99) checkpoint-restore duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_restore_time_p100
fields.description: Maximum (p100) checkpoint-restore duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_restore_time_initial
fields.description: Duration in seconds of the earliest-completing restore (the resume restore).

fields.name: num_checkpoint_restore_datapoints
fields.description: Count of distinct checkpoint-restore datapoints.

fields.name: checkpoint_delete_time_min
fields.description: Minimum checkpoint-delete (cleanup) duration in seconds (per distributed checkpoint).

fields.name: checkpoint_delete_time_max
fields.description: Maximum checkpoint-delete (cleanup) duration in seconds (per distributed checkpoint).

fields.name: checkpoint_delete_time_avg
fields.description: Mean checkpoint-delete (cleanup) duration in seconds (per distributed checkpoint).

fields.name: checkpoint_delete_time_stddev
fields.description: Standard deviation of checkpoint-delete durations in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_delete_time_p50
fields.description: Median (p50) checkpoint-delete duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_delete_time_p90
fields.description: 90th-percentile (p90) checkpoint-delete duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_delete_time_p99
fields.description: 99th-percentile (p99) checkpoint-delete duration in seconds.

fields.name: checkpoint_delete_time_p100
fields.description: Maximum (p100) checkpoint-delete duration in seconds.

fields.name: num_checkpoint_delete_datapoints
fields.description: Count of distinct checkpoint-delete datapoints.

fields.name: accelerator_blocked_time
fields.description: Seconds the accelerator was blocked waiting on data loading (bottleneck rank, run-wide).

fields.name: accelerator_blocked_percent
fields.description: Percent of wall-clock time the accelerator was blocked on data loading (bottleneck rank, run-wide).

fields.name: cpu_usage_peak_cores
fields.description: Peak CPU usage in cores over the run window; max across worker pods (bottleneck pod).

fields.name: cpu_usage_mean_cores
fields.description: Mean CPU usage in cores over the run window; max of per-pod means across worker pods (bottleneck pod).

fields.name: memory_usage_peak_bytes
fields.description: Peak container memory usage in bytes over the run window; max across worker pods (bottleneck pod).

fields.name: network_received_peak_bytes_per_sec
fields.description: Peak pod network receive rate in bytes/s over the run window; max across worker pods (bottleneck pod).

fields.name: network_received_mean_bytes_per_sec
fields.description: Mean pod network receive rate in bytes/s over the run window; max of per-pod means across worker pods (bottleneck pod).

fields.name: network_sent_peak_bytes_per_sec
fields.description: Peak pod network send rate in bytes/s over the run window; max across worker pods (bottleneck pod).

fields.name: network_sent_mean_bytes_per_sec
fields.description: Mean pod network send rate in bytes/s over the run window; max of per-pod means across worker pods (bottleneck pod).

fields.name: checkpoint_read_bytes
fields.description: Total bytes served (egress) from the per-run checkpoint bucket over the run window; downloaded during restore.

fields.name: checkpoint_read_request_count
fields.description: Count of object-read requests against the checkpoint bucket over the run window.

fields.name: checkpoint_restored_bytes
fields.description: Size in bytes (du) of the restored checkpoint; denominator of the checkpoint read-amplification ratio.

fields.name: checkpoint_read_amplification_ratio
fields.description: checkpoint_read_bytes / checkpoint_restored_bytes. DDP ~= world_size (every rank pulls the full checkpoint); FSDP ~= 1 (each pulls its shard).

fields.name: dataset_read_bytes
fields.description: Total bytes served (egress) from the per-run dataset bucket over the run window.

fields.name: dataset_read_request_count
fields.description: Count of object-read requests against the dataset bucket over the run window.

fields.name: dataset_size_bytes
fields.description: Size in bytes (du) of the per-run dataset bucket (a full unique copy).

fields.name: dataset_read_amplification_ratio
fields.description: dataset_read_bytes / (executed_steps * global_batch_size * dataset_size_bytes / dataset_sample_count). Egress per byte a perfectly sharded single pass over the consumed samples would need: ~1 = each needed byte fetched once, ~world_size = every rank re-read the same data. Normalized by samples consumed, so it is independent of dataset size, step count, and epoch count.

fields.name: memory_usage_mean_bytes
fields.description: Mean container memory usage in bytes over the run window; max of per-pod means across worker pods (bottleneck pod).

fields.name: memory_limit_utilization_peak
fields.description: Peak fraction of the container memory limit over the run window (bottleneck pod); how close restore got to OOM.

fields.name: cpu_limit_utilization_peak
fields.description: Peak fraction of the container CPU limit over the run window (bottleneck pod); whether the workload is pegged (compute-bound) vs I/O idle.

fields.name: dataset_sample_count
fields.description: Estimated total rows in the dataset: dataset_size_bytes / per-sample stored bytes, where per-sample bytes are measured from the largest shard via the datasets library (format-agnostic, streamed). Used to derive per-sample bytes for the read-amplification ratio.
